description: This pipeline processes multichannel images by splitting them into multiple greyscale images for each 2D image slice, enabling further analysis or processing of individual channels.

4be0eeaf-8529-443d-9efe-a4a1718c6b0a.name: ij1-color-split-channels-2
4be0eeaf-8529-443d-9efe-a4a1718c6b0a.description: Splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. This operation is applied for each 2D image slice.
